raw_text: career 02/ 2015 - present (getafe-spain) (sevilla-spain) (manching- germany) airbus 02/ 2015 - present (getafe-espaa) 11/2012 - 02/2014 (getafe-spain) (sevilla-spain) (toulouse-france) 01/2009 02/2015 (getafe-spain) (bournemouth-uk) (brize norton-uk) 09/2008 01/2009 (getafe-spain) engineering driven people 01/2008 09/2008 (getafe-spain) formation 2002-2007 madrid-espaa process engineer for ddms@euromale responsible of develop-fulfill concurrence package regarding to electrical and mechanical manufacturing: concurrence, process definition, tool requirements definition, tool testing. process engineer for a330-mrtt (faf, gos, rokaf, faf, mmf), systems responsible of nose zone responsible of refurbishing support to fal: management of manufacturing queries, definition and release of work orders and other technical documentation, process definition, concurrence with design office, industrial planning definition, non conformity queries solving (rp3 electrical) fti design engineer for a400m responsible of power plant & fsf support to map, special instructions definition. electrical design engineer for a330-mrtt (raaf, fsta, uae, raf, gos) definition and modification of wiring diagrams, harness, control units and installations, support to manufacturing on fal, support to customer for ssbb implementation (fsta airtanker), responsible of design on fuselage area, responsible of service bulletins (ssbb). electrical design engineer for a330-mrtt (fsta), for airbus ds definition and modification of harness and electrical installation support to manufacturing on fal. electrical design engineer for a330-mrtt (raaf, fsta), for airbus defenseg space definition and modification of harness and electrical installation support to manufacturing on fal. electrical design engineer for as50xwb, for airbus definition of sam a for htp and vtp, regarding electrical installations. technical aeronautial engineering (aerospace equipments and materials) universidad politécnica de madrid
